text: Torcha is now fully functional and implemented! Go collect your favorite castaways!
New tool launched (still in beta)! Try Torcha, our new Survivor gacha card game!
Mobile version refined and updated. Still not 100% perfect!
Sutral and Tally are completed and are out of the Beta stage.
Edger and Outlist are now out of their Beta version!
Complete remake of the website: new design, unified cast export feature and more.
